sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97207" key="stri/c" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στρίξ</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, gen. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στριγός</foreign> (not found), acc. <sense id="n97207.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">στρίγγα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Carm.Pop.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>:—<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">owl</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">41</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">132</biblScope> </bibl> (where also a form <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στλίξ</orth> is cited).</sense> </entryFree>
